SEARCH
Package nl.mtvehicles.core.infrastructure.dependencies

Klasse VaultUtils

java.lang.Object
nl.mtvehicles.core.infrastructure.dependencies.VaultUtils
public class VaultUtils extends Object
Methods for Vault soft-dependency.
Beware!
Do not initialise this class directly. Use DependencyModule.vault instead.

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    VaultUtils()
    Default constructor which sets up Vault-linked economy plugin - do not use this.
    Use DependencyModule.vault instead.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    boolean
    depositMoneyPlayer(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer p, double amount)
    Deposit money into player's account
    String
    getEconomyName()
    Get name of the economy plugin.
    String
    getMoneyFormat(double amount)
    Get an amount of money in a string format (e.g. 23.8901 -> '$23,89').
    boolean
    isEconomySetUp()
    Check whether an economy plugin is linked.
    boolean
    withdrawMoneyPlayer(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer p, double amount)
    Remove/Withdraw money from player's account

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • VaultUtils

      public VaultUtils()
      Default constructor which sets up Vault-linked economy plugin - do not use this.
      Use DependencyModule.vault instead.

  • Methodendetails

    • isEconomySetUp

      public boolean isEconomySetUp()
      Check whether an economy plugin is linked.
      Gibt zurück:
      True if an economy plugin is set up and linked.

    • getEconomyName

      public String getEconomyName()
      Get name of the economy plugin.

    • depositMoneyPlayer

      public boolean depositMoneyPlayer(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer p, double amount)
      Deposit money into player's account
      Parameter:
      p - Player
      amount - Amount of money
      Gibt zurück:
      True if the withdrawal was successful, otherwise false (usually due to an unexpected error).

    • withdrawMoneyPlayer

      public boolean withdrawMoneyPlayer(org.bukkit.OfflinePlayer p, double amount)
      Remove/Withdraw money from player's account
      Parameter:
      p - Player
      amount - Amount of money
      Gibt zurück:
      True if the withdrawal was successful, otherwise false (usually due to insufficient funds).

    • getMoneyFormat

      public String getMoneyFormat(double amount)
      Get an amount of money in a string format (e.g. 23.8901 -> '$23,89'). This uses format specified by your economy plugin.
      Parameter:
      amount - Amount of money
